'''Graf''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and a part of the [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. He was questioned about how classified information was sent to him after [[Belezaboth Ourn]] turned over a black box used to communicate with [[Nil Spaar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
